text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: ...Phew.
choice_data_list: That was great, Taishin! You must be tired.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Not even. Hell, this isn't the time to be<n>tired.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: This is just the beginning.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Come on, let's go.

Her cool demeanor never wavers, but<n>I can tell her
stride is much more<n>confident than it was before
the race.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: So about my next race...
choice_data_list: You're thinking about the next race already?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
You got a problem with that, or are<n>you looking to
get kicked again?

I'm still stinging from the one she<n>gave me before
the race, and I shake<n>my head hurriedly.

If she were serious, I'm sure she<n>could've put
me in the hospital, so I<n>assume she must've been
holding<n>back...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Anyway, about my next race... Or well,<n>I guess this
is more about my future<n>plans.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: I want to take on the Classic Triple<n>Crown.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
If I'm gonna show up all my haters, I<n>can't do
just any old race.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
My only option is to win the Satsuki<n>Sho, the
Japanese Derby, and the<n>Kikuka Sho, where only
the best<n>gather to battle it out.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: I'll win 'em and make everyone eat<n>their words.

However, the Satsuki Sho is still a<n>ways off. It
would be best to enter<n>her into some junior races
so she<n>can gain more experience.
To that end...
choice_data_list:
How do you feel about running the Hopeful Stakes
first?

How do you feel about running the Hopeful Stakes
first?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Isn't that a junior G1 race?

Just like the Satsuki Sho, the Hopeful<n>Stakes is a
2,000-meter race held at<n>Nakayama Racecourse.

I tell her that it would be a good<n>opportunity to get
a feel for what the<n>real deal will be like.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Got it. Then let's do it.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: And if I'm running it, then I'm<n>winning it.

With that, we set our sights on the<n>Hopeful
Stakes!
